race.description: Tristan Triffitt Exclusive Estate Agents Hcp (Bm64)
race.comment: PRESIDES (1) won well here first-up, then slowly away and failed to get into the contest from an inside gate with a disappointing eighth over 1200m at Gosford. Ready for the extra trip and looks well placed with Keatings' claim in his right race. HEURISTIC (3) returned from a lengthy spell with an eye-catching fifth over 1100m at Warwick Farm in BM72 class. Proven in the going and will appreciate the extra distance. Sharp improver. EASIEST CHOICE (8) deep into the campaign and returns from a 33-day let-up. Stalked the good tempo in a solid rating contest with a narrow third over 1350m at Wyong in BM68 grade. In career best form and has genuine winning claims. OLINGTON LANE (18) undefeated in two career starts and deserves his chance in this grade. Came with a well timed run from back in the field to score a narrow win as fav over 1200m at Goulburn. Top-four player.
